name: CLOAK&DAGGER
description: Tyrone Johnson and Tandy Bowen are nearly inseparable, like two sides of the same coin. Intertwined by forces of shadow and light, Cloak & Dagger fight as a united front, dealing havoc and healing allies across the arena.
lore: When teenage runaways Tandy Bowen and Tyrone Johnson were exposed to an experimental drug against their will, they unexpectedly gained extraordinary powers. Tandy generates piercing blades of pure, healing light, while Ty can teleport himself and others through the Darkforce Dimension. Together, they illuminate New York's deepest shadows as Cloak and Dagger. The Timestream Entanglement struck while Cloak and Dagger were traversing the Darkforce Dimension. The pair emerged to find New York under the control of Dracula. They soon joined the heroic resistance fighting against the Empire of Eternal Night.

abilities.name: Darkforce Cloak
abilities.description: Inflict continuous damage on an enemy

stats.Special Effect: Attacks will target the nearest enemy to the crosshair, dealing damage

abilities.name: Eternal Bond
abilities.description: Perform four rapid dashes, healing allies and damaging enemies along the path

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 4m radius and 15m in length

abilities.name: Terror Cape
abilities.description: Deploy a Veil of Darkforce to damage enemies upon touch, applying Blind to narrow their sight and Vulnerability to amplify damage received

stats.Special Effect: The spell field advances along the casting path

abilities.name: Dark Teleportation
abilities.description: Enshroud nearby allies in the Darkforce Dimension, plunging them into the Phased state, making them untargetable and invisible to enemies and granting them a Movement Boost

stats.Special Effect: Allies within the area gain Invisibility and Movement Boost
stats.Cooldown: Veil of Lightforce & Terror Cape share charges, capped out at 2 with each taking 10s to recharge. After using either, both abilities enter a 2s cooldown

abilities.name: Lightforce Dagger
abilities.description: Unleash a bouncing Lightforce Dagger to damage enemies and heal nearby allies

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile that generates a spell area upon impact
stats.Special Effect: The projectile features an attraction effect, pulling in the closest target to the crosshair and creating a spell field upon impact. This spell field provides healing effects

abilities.name: Eternal Bond
abilities.description: Perform four rapid dashes, healing allies and damaging enemies along the path

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 4m radius and 15m in length

abilities.name: Veil of Lightforce
abilities.description: Deploy a Veil of Lightforce to heal allies upon touch and grant them a Healing Boost

stats.Special Effect: The spell field advances along the casting path

abilities.name: Dagger Storm
abilities.description: Launch a volley of daggers, creating a Healing Over Time field in the impact area

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile with delayed impact that also generates a spell field
stats.Cooldown: Veil of Lightforce & Terror Cape share charges, capped out at 2 with each taking 10s to recharge. After using either, both abilities enter a 2s cooldown
stats.Special Effect: When a Spell Field is created, allies in range get a One-Time Healing of 60

received.name: FROM SHADOW TO LIGHT
received.description: Cloak & Dagger inject light and dark energy into Hawkeye's katana. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, enemies hit are launched back, and a blade wave filled with light and energy sweeps forward. This wave passes through both allies and enemies: it heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability

base.description: Veil of Lightforce and Terror Cape are warped by hellfire energy, changing into Veil of Light and Veil of Darkness while retaining their original effects. After traveling a set distance, the veils halt in place. Enemy damage passing through the Veil of Light is weakened, while enemy healing passing through the Veil of Darkness suffers Healing Reduction.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with The Hood, the width of both the Veil of Light and Veil of Darkness expands. Additionally, allies passing through the veils are empowered by hellfire energy, gaining Damage Boost for a duration.

base.description: Channel frost energy outward to encase yourself in an absolute block of ice. This offers great protection, but Freezes you in place. While frozen, you can be healed and emit a weak healing aura to nearby allies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Luna Snow, the healing aura provided to allies while Frozen becomes significantly stronger.
